name: Particulate & VOC air quality
description: Air monitors reporting particulate matter and/or volatile-organic-compound load (PM1.0/PM2.5/PM10, TVOC, or an IAQ index). Distinct from `air-quality`, which is CO2.
notes: PM keys are µg/m³; air.tvoc is ppb (convert µg/m³ readings, or keep mass concentration as a camelCase extra); air.iaqIndex is a 0-500 score.
